newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 (early May) raised FY26 revenue guidance to $18.5-19.25B on AI data-center MEP demand; AGM was June 4. All known at the prior case. No new fundamentals since.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: data-center MEP thesis intact (raised FY26 guide), but EME is a discovered, consensus Strong Buy far from the passive/power bottleneck core; no new info since June 9. Stays in Monitor/benchmark bucket. Hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI/cloud data-center construction driving electrical and mechanical (cooling) MEP demand.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded consensus name with little residual alpha vs passives; far from the power-bottleneck core.
verdicts.bull: Top-3 ENR MEP scale and raised FY26 guide capture sustained AI data-center buildout with strong balance sheet.
verdicts.neutral: Solid AI-adjacent execution but well-discovered; benchmark exposure, not differentiated residual alpha.
verdicts.bear: Consensus Strong Buy at full valuation; AI capex cyclicality and labor cost pressure cap asymmetry.
